headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; frame-src https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://www.youtube.com; connect-src 'self'; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests
